recall.description: Load session context from memory/ after a clear or at session start. Resume work without re-briefing. Usage: /recall [project-name]
recall.template: The user wants to recall their session context. Follow the recall skill step by step. If a project name is mentioned, use it. Otherwise read the index.

archive.description: Archive the current session before a clear. Saves decisions, project state, next steps and asset URLs to memory/. Usage: /archive
archive.template: The user wants to archive this session before clearing. Follow the archive skill step by step.
